basics.name: Robert Townsend
basics.label: Full-Stack Developer → AI Agent Architect
basics.summary: Full-stack developer with 15+ years building production web applications across healthcare, energy, fintech, and cloud infrastructure. Currently focused on AI agent orchestration and multi-agent systems at AWS. I started as a designer — that path from visual communication to multi-agent orchestration taught me that the best software is built at the intersection of human experience and technical depth.

work.name: Amazon Web Services
work.summary: AI agent orchestration and frontend delivery for AWS Marketplace
highlights: Architected a multi-agent AI orchestration framework coordinating 4+ specialized agents in parallel — reduced complex development task completion time by 60%
Built 2 production MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers: macOS UI automation (Python/PyObjC, 15+ tools) and tmux task delegation (Node.js, 8+ tools)
Developed an AWS Bedrock + RAG chatbot that became the single source of truth for Cloudscape/Venue design system guidance
Created the Recursive Language Model (RLM) benchmarking framework, comparing orchestration strategies across 10 AWS service domains
Built Fusion Agent Registry and CLI tooling managing 20+ AI agent configurations
Automated the code review lifecycle with custom AI agents — cut manual review overhead by 50%
Shipped frontend UI components to millions of AWS customers using React, TypeScript, and Cloudscape

work.name: TotalEnergies
work.summary: Energy storage modeling platform with React/FastAPI/AWS
highlights: Built a React/FastAPI application modeling grid-scale energy storage — processed simulations across 10+ year horizons with an AWS Lambda backend
Migrated the entire backend from Flask to FastAPI, accelerating API response times and enabling async processing
Engineered CI/CD pipelines in GitHub Actions with automated unit, integration, and visual regression tests
Eliminated 100% of known security vulnerabilities across the full application stack
Conducted stakeholder interviews and delivered a UX redesign informed by direct user testing with energy traders

work.name: Airstrip Technologies
work.summary: HIPAA-compliant telehealth platforms with real-time patient monitoring
highlights: Architected HIPAA-compliant telehealth platforms with live remote patient monitoring, deployed across hospital systems nationwide
Built a real-time WebGL telemetry dashboard rendering live patient vitals — handled continuous data streams with sub-second latency
Modernized infrastructure: containerized microservices, automated CI/CD pipelines, and hardened deployment security
Directed cross-functional teams spanning product, engineering, QA, and design through multiple major platform releases

work.name: Amazon
highlights: Built internal tools managing software deployment across Amazon's global mobile device fleet (thousands of devices)
Created D3/React data dashboards tracking provisioning performance in real time
Designed secure REST APIs integrating with Java backend services

work.name: Mutual Mobile
highlights: Spearheaded LeanUX methodology for cross-platform financial education tools — won Gold Davey Award and multiple W3 Awards
Built a browser-based Google Glass simulator before official hardware release
Championed user testing, iteration, and analytics-driven development across mobile and web platforms

work.name: Projekt202
highlights: Built international mobile-first web solutions with Backbone.js, Bootstrap, and REST APIs

work.name: Simply Interactive
highlights: Directed full-stack development for education and corporate clients; established Agile workflows
